name: A Winding Mountain Trail
description:
The trail heads west and uphill toward the castle above.  You see a large
turret rising high above the main entrance, it's rounded walls standing out
from the rest of the castle.  You see that the gates are closed, probably
locked.  As you look up at the menacing castle above you, a shiver runs through
your very soul.  This whole place gives you a very bad feeling.
